model_specification_line: fit = smf.wls("full_time ~ eligible + eligible:post + C(statefip) + C(year) + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + JAIL287G + LFPR + UNEMP", data=merged, weights=merged["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": merged["statefip"]})
